sections.paragraph:
Original: חלל

Transliteration: châlâl

Phonetic: khaw-lawl'

BDB Definition:

  1. slain, fatally wounded, pierced (noun masculine)
    1. pierced, fatally wounded
    2. slain
  2. (CLBL) profaned (adjective)
    1. defiled, profaned (by divorce)

Origin: from H2490

TWOT entry: 660a

Part(s) of speech:
